type PolicyNonComplianceMessage = class interface IJsonModel<PolicyNonComplianceMessage> interface IPersistableModel<PolicyNonComplianceMessage>

Docs.summary: A message that describes why a resource is non-compliant with the policy. This is shown in 'deny' error messages and on resource's non-compliant compliance results.

MemberSignature.Value: public string PolicyDefinitionReferenceId { get; set; }
.property instance string PolicyDefinitionReferenceId
Public Property PolicyDefinitionReferenceId As String
member this.PolicyDefinitionReferenceId : string with get, set

Docs.summary: The policy definition reference ID within a policy set definition the message is intended for. This is only applicable if the policy assignment assigns a policy set definition. If this is not provided the message applies to all policies assigned by this policy assignment.
